name: loopsmith
description: Codex plugin for the loopsmith control plane, maintenance skill, and routing guidance.

interface.longDescription: Expose loopsmith as the front door for capability discovery, maintenance, research routing, and deep workflow launch, while keeping skills, vendor CLIs, Playwright, and Codex as the authoritative execution layers.
defaultPrompt: Use $agentctl-router to pick the right agentctl command or workflow.
Use $agentctl-router to check whether maintenance or a deep workflow is the next step.
